label: 2026-06-08 close
title: Daily FI Market Tape | 2026-06-08 close
summary: 6 月 8 日 UST 前端暫停但長端續升：2Y 4.15% 日降 2bp、10Y 4.56% 日升 1bp、30Y 5.03% 日升 2bp，2s10s 轉陡至 41bp。
美股出現 AI dip-buying：SOX +5.6%、Nasdaq 100 +1.6%、S&P 500 +0.3%，但 Dow -0.2%、市場廣度不足，反彈仍偏集中。
本周核心事件是 6/10 CPI，市場預期 headline 約 4.2% y/y；Fed 年底升息已重新進入價格，第二次升息約 16%。
台北配置需拆分 FX translation 與利率價格：USD/TWD 收 31.58 支撐 TWD NAV 換算，但 30Y 5.03%、Brent 94.37、LQD 小跌仍限制全面加碼。

headline.primary: 前端暫停不等於利率風險解除，長端 5% 區間仍是本周 CPI 前的主要壓力
headline.secondary: 2Y 4.15%、10Y 4.56%、30Y 5.03%；SOX +5.6% 修復情緒，但 Duration 加碼仍需 CPI 低於 4.1% 確認。

positioning.label: Duration
positioning.view: 小幅正向、僅限 中段
positioning.best_expression: 5Y-10Y 分批觀察；CPI 低於 4.1% 才確認加碼。
positioning.risk_trigger: 10Y 上破 4.65% 或 30Y 上破 5.08% 時停止加碼。

positioning.label: Curve
positioning.best_expression: 5Y-10Y 超配、2Y 不追多、30Y 小部位。
positioning.risk_trigger: 2s10s 跌回 35bp 代表 Fed 壓力再起。

positioning.label: Credit / ETF
positioning.view: IG 高品質收益 優先
positioning.best_expression: 短中天期 IG 與高流動性 ETF 優先，HY beta 只保留觀察。
positioning.risk_trigger: LQD <108 或 HYG <79 時降低 credit beta。

positioning.label: FX / NAV
positioning.best_expression: USD/TWD 31.58 支撐 TWD NAV 換算，但不單獨作加碼理由。
positioning.risk_trigger: USD/TWD >31.65 同時 LQD 下破 108 時先看利率/信用抵銷。

positioning.label: 加碼條件
positioning.best_expression: CPI 低於 4.1%、Brent <92、10Y <4.50 三者至少兩項成立。
positioning.risk_trigger: CPI >4.2%、Brent >98 或 SOX 跌回 12,000 取消加碼。

driver_decomposition.fi_impact: 前端暫停但長端上行，Duration 回報仍受 期限溢價 限制。
CPI 是 10Y 4.65% 或 4.50% 的分水嶺。
降低 forced selling，但尚未壓低 UST 或 credit 利差 risk。
能源溢價維持 Fed / ECB credibility 壓力，限制長端 反彈。
美元維持高位支撐未避險美元債的 TWD NAV 換算，但利率與信用價格回報仍可能抵銷匯率助益。
長端收益率沒有隨前端回落，代表期限溢價與發債吸收壓力仍在；高 Duration ETF 的價格回報需要更高收益率緩衝。

sections.title: 一、美債收盤與曲線變化
sections.takeaway: UST 不是單純 喘息：前端小降，長端續升，曲線從上周 熊市壓平 轉為 sticky 長端。
paragraphs: 6 月 8 日美債收盤把上周五的單向 熊市壓平 變成更複雜的長端黏著。官方 CMT 顯示 2Y 收 4.15%、日降 2bp，5Y 收 4.29%、持平，10Y 收 4.56%、日升 1bp，20Y 收 5.05%、30Y 收 5.03%、各升 2bp。2s10s 從 38bp 轉陡到 41bp，5s30s 從 72bp 轉到 74bp，說明 前端 在 CPI 前暫停，但長端仍要求 inflation / supply premium。這個組合對 ETF 的意義是，前端小幅回落只改善 carry 心理，並未改善長端 價格回報；若投資人把 2Y 的 -2bp 當成整條曲線轉多，會低估 20Y / 30Y 對通膨與供給的敏感度。

周變化仍是升息尾端風險的價格。2Y 較 6 月 1 日高 10bp，5Y 高 11bp，10Y 高 9bp，20Y 高 6bp，30Y 高 4bp；月變化更明顯，2Y 高 25bp、5Y 高 27bp、10Y 高 18bp、20Y 高 12bp、30Y 高 8bp。這表示 2Y 的單日小幅回落沒有改變整體高利率 regime，配置上不能把 4.15% 前端視為 Fed 已轉向。周/月變化也讓風險控管更清楚：若 10Y 仍比一周前高接近 10bp，所有中長天期債券 ETF 的日內反彈都只是修復，不是趨勢反轉，部位必須分批而非一次到位。

曲線的日內訊號是 熊市轉陡 aftershock，而不是成長恐慌。2s10s 日轉陡 3bp、5s30s 轉陡 2bp，長端在 30Y 5.03% 附近仍然沒有吸引足夠買盤壓低收益率。若 CPI headline 接近 4.2% y/y，或核心月增沒有降溫，10Y 4.56% 可能只是上測 4.65% 前的中繼，而不是本輪高點。因此曲線交易要把「前端政策機率」和「長端期限溢價」拆開處理；前者靠 CPI 和 FOMC 聲明驗證，後者還受到能源、海外央行和供給預期牽動。

就業資料仍是利率背景的第一層。May payrolls +172k，高於約 +80k 至 +85k 共識，失業率 4.3%，使市場重新定價年底 25bp 升息，並把第二次升息機率抬到約 16%。公布值 / 預期 / 前值 的組合告訴市場，Fed 暫停不是因為 labor slack，而是等待通膨是否確認；這使 2Y-5Y 對 CPI 和 FOMC wording 特別敏感。 這個訊號需要落到部位管理：先確認數字是否改變利率、匯率或利差通道，再決定是增加 Duration、保留 carry，還是降低 beta。

油價讓長端更難 反彈。Brent 6 月 8 日收 94.37 美元、日升 1.4%，WTI 收 91.42 美元、日升約 1.0%；中東衝突有降溫訊號但未完全解除，能源價格仍可能把 headline CPI 推高。Fed 若把油價視為一次性，前端才有空間回落；若擔心二階效應，10Y 與 breakeven 會先反映。 這個訊號需要落到部位管理：先確認數字是否改變利率、匯率或利差通道，再決定是增加 Duration、保留 carry，還是降低 beta。
美債收盤與亞洲盤資訊相互呼應。亞洲時段一度看到 2Y、5Y 上行 2-5bp，10Y 觸及約 4.57%；收盤時前端回落但長端仍高，代表 實質買盤 只願意在短中段做觀察性承接，對 30Y 5% 以上的 期限溢價 還沒有給出強買訊號。 這個訊號需要落到部位管理：先確認數字是否改變利率、匯率或利差通道，再決定是增加 Duration、保留 carry，還是降低 beta。

投資含義是把 10Y 4.55%-4.65% 當成壓力區，而不是立即加碼區。若 CPI 低於 4.1% 且 Brent 回到 92 美元下方，5Y-10Y 可分批增加；若 CPI 接近 4.2%-4.3% 或 30Y 站上 5.08%，則保留現金與短天期 carry，避免在 長端 追價。 這個訊號需要落到部位管理：先確認數字是否改變利率、匯率或利差通道，再決定是增加 Duration、保留 carry，還是降低 beta。

sections.title: 二、美債走勢解讀
sections.takeaway: Fed path 的分歧擴大：股市押薪資降溫，債市仍要求 CPI 先證明通膨不會再加速。
paragraphs: 本日利率解讀的關鍵不是 2Y 小跌，而是 前端 沒有能力真正 反彈。市場一方面看到薪資增速放緩，使 AI / 成長股願意逢低買；另一方面又看到 headline CPI 預期約 4.2% y/y、油價仍高、就業 +172k，讓 Fed 很難在 6 月 16-17 保留降息傾向。這就是股票反彈但 10Y 仍升到 4.56% 的原因。換句話說，股票市場願意買薪資降溫，但債市要求看見通膨實際降溫；這兩者在 CPI 前可以並存，也正是風險資產反彈、UST 沒有同步 反彈 的核心矛盾。

Fed 政策邏輯 現在更像「抗通膨可信度」測試。若 Warsh 首場 FOMC 只強調等待，市場會問為何在就業 beat、headline CPI 可能重返 4% 以上、DXY 仍在 100 附近時不移除 降息傾向；若他強調油價二階效應，2Y 4.15% 會重新往 4.20% 測試。這讓 前端 交易變成 event-risk 而不是 carry trade。這會直接影響前端避險成本與短券再投資收益：若 Fed 不能保留降息空間，短天期收益雖高，但中長天期資本利得必須等待更明確的 inflation surprise。

JPMorgan 把年末 10Y 目標放在 4.70% 的語境很重要。若 10Y 4.56% 只是相對短期區間高位，中段 有交易價值；若 4.70% 變成 baseline，所有 7Y-10Y 以上的 ETF 價格回報 都需要重估。投資人應把 4.45% 當成確認 反彈 的下緣，把 4.65%-4.70% 當成止損與重新配置的區間。對台灣投資人來說，這個區間也決定美元債 ETF 的加碼節奏；4.45% 以下是 價格回報 修復，4.65% 以上則會讓配息收益被淨值波動吞掉。

日本資金流提供一個限制長端上行的緩衝，但不是立即反轉訊號。日本信託帳戶 5 月買進海外債淨額 3.16 兆日圓、約 197 億美元，創 2005 年以來紀錄，顯示 4.6%-4.7% 的 10Y 對日本 pension proxy 有吸引力。問題是中東與 Fed 方向未清前，這類買盤更像區間承接，不是壓低整條曲線的趨勢力量。 這個訊號需要落到部位管理：先確認數字是否改變利率、匯率或利差通道，再決定是增加 Duration、保留 carry，還是降低 beta。

全球央行也在增加美債 解讀 的複雜度。ECB 本周可能因歐元區 3.2% 通膨進行 保險式升息，市場看今年兩次 25bp；BOJ 6 月 15-16 也仍有升息理由。若歐洲和日本都用 credibility 語言回應能源衝擊，全球利率 buyer 的 opportunity cost 會上升，美債長端需要更高收益率吸收。 這個訊號需要落到部位管理：先確認數字是否改變利率、匯率或利差通道，再決定是增加 Duration、保留 carry，還是降低 beta。

Credit market 的反應比股票冷靜。LQD 108.06、日跌 0.1%，HYG 79.54、日升 0.1%，代表 IG duration 仍被 長端 yield 壓住，但 HY beta 沒有跟著 Friday 的壓力擴散。這種組合支持「不砍 高品質收益，但不追長天期 credit」的配置，而不是把 AI rebound 解讀為信用全面轉強。 這個訊號需要落到部位管理：先確認數字是否改變利率、匯率或利差通道，再決定是增加 Duration、保留 carry，還是降低 beta。

台幣海外債 ETF 要拆成三個回報通道。USD/TWD 台北收 31.58、日貶 1.05 角，對未避險美元債的 TWD NAV 是正向換算；但 10Y +1bp、30Y +2bp 和 LQD -0.1% 會吃掉部分 FX translation。若後續 USD/TWD 維持 31.55 以上且 10Y 回到 4.50% 下方，才是匯率和利率同向改善；若只有美元升值，則只能算 attribution，不是加碼理由。 這個訊號需要落到部位管理：先確認數字是否改變利率、匯率或利差通道，再決定是增加 Duration、保留 carry，還是降低 beta。

sections.title: 三、其他市場動向
sections.takeaway: AI 反彈修復風險情緒，但廣度、油價與亞洲 FX 都提醒 FI 不宜跟著股票全面 re-risk。
paragraphs: 跨資產收盤是一個 narrow rebound。S&P 500 收 7,405.73、日升 0.3%，Nasdaq 100 收 29,414.26、日升 1.6%，SOX 收 12,906.69、日升 5.6%，但 Dow 小跌 0.2%，且報導指多數 S&P 成分股仍下跌。這說明 AI / 半導體 dip-buying 支撐 headline index，卻沒有讓風險偏好全面擴散。這種反彈對 FI 的驗證力有限，因為半導體是倉位最擁擠的 beta，而不是最能代表信用現金流的資產；若廣度沒有擴散，credit 利差 不一定跟著收斂。

晶片股急彈是對 Friday 10% 跌幅的倉位修復，而不是利率壓力消失。市場仍要面對 6 月 10 日 CPI、6 月 FOMC、以及 SpaceX / Moonshot / 大型 IPO 和 AI 融資的資金吸收。若 IPO calendar 能被市場吸收，AI trade 可延續；若供給造成 cash drag，long-duration equity 和 credit beta 會再被折現率拉回。因此 AI 融資和 IPO 不是純股票故事，而是資金需求故事；大型供給若與高利率同時出現，會和 Treasury、IG 新券、私募信貸一起競爭投資人資金。

油價走勢介於 喘息 和 risk premium 之間。Brent 收 94.37 美元、較前一日升 1.4%，但低於周末衝高；市場把伊朗和以色列「放緩攻擊」當成風險資產支撐，卻仍保留能源溢價。對 FI 而言，這個價位不會立即觸發 stagflation panic，但足以讓 CPI 和 ECB / Fed credibility 語言維持偏鷹。油價停在 94 美元附近時，市場不會立即交易衰退，但央行也不容易放鬆；這會讓前端升息風險和長端通膨補償同時留在價格裡。

亞洲 FX 壓力變成信用篩選器。菲律賓監管機構提醒大型企業未來三年有約 260 億美元到期債務，其中美元債平均占 37.6%，背景是 peso 觸及紀錄低位。這不是單一國家事件，而是油價、美元與再融資牆共同作用下，亞洲信用必須檢查 currency mismatch 的例子。 這個訊號需要落到部位管理：先確認數字是否改變利率、匯率或利差通道，再決定是增加 Duration、保留 carry，還是降低 beta。

印尼仍是 EM policy credibility 的壓力點。Danantara 赴美 roadshow，計畫部分用途包括 refinancing 10 億美元貸款，但其 offering memorandum 指政府不保證債務；印尼主權美元債利差年內約擴 3bp 至 71bp，而亞洲 IG 同期收斂 13bp 至約 50bp。這種相對 underperformance 會使新券 concession 上升。 這個訊號需要落到部位管理：先確認數字是否改變利率、匯率或利差通道，再決定是增加 Duration、保留 carry，還是降低 beta。

韓國則顯示 AI boom 對債市未必是好消息。韓債今年本幣報酬 -7.5%，三年期殖利率約 3.9%，BOK swaps 定價今年至少三次升息至 3.25%，核心通膨 2.5%。AI 與半導體帶動股票資金與成長預期，也推高通膨、財政收入與債券供給疑慮，這是亞洲 duration 的反面案例。 這個訊號需要落到部位管理：先確認數字是否改變利率、匯率或利差通道，再決定是增加 Duration、保留 carry，還是降低 beta。

日本提供兩條相反訊號。Q1 GDP 年化仍有 1.8%，消費 +0.3%、出口支撐成長，使 BOJ 6 月升息理由仍在；但企業投資從 +0.3% 初值下修到 -0.7%，說明高油價與伊朗衝突已影響企業支出。對全球 FI，日資仍可能買海外債，但 BOJ 正常化與 JPY 波動會提高避險與再平衡成本。 這個訊號需要落到部位管理：先確認數字是否改變利率、匯率或利差通道，再決定是增加 Duration、保留 carry，還是降低 beta。

sections.title: 四、配置含義
sections.takeaway: 配置上保留短中段 carry 與 IG quality，AI rebound 只提高觀察信心，不是全面加碼訊號。
paragraphs: Duration 配置維持中性偏小幅正向，但只放在 5Y-10Y 的觀察性承接。2Y 4.15%、5Y 4.29%、10Y 4.56% 的收益率水準有吸引力，卻還沒有 CPI 確認；因此第一段只做小幅分批，確認加碼需要 headline CPI 低於 4.1%、core m/m 放緩、10Y 回到 4.50% 附近。這個配置順序把收益率水準與確認訊號分開：收益率已足以開始觀察，但確認訊號仍不足以把現金快速轉入高 Duration 部位。

Curve 配置避免追 前端 反彈。2s10s 已回到 41bp，若 CPI 不差，2Y 仍可能因 Fed 語句再上行；若 CPI 明顯低於預期，中段 比 前端 更能保留 價格回報。較好的結構是 5Y-10Y 超配、2Y 不追多、30Y 保持小部位，等 30Y 低於 5.00% 才加大 長端。若曲線再次壓平，代表 Fed 壓力回到前端；若曲線轉陡但 30Y 上升，代表長端補償不足，兩種情境都不適合無條件擴大部位。

Credit / ETF 配置偏 IG quality 和短天期 carry。LQD 小跌 0.1%、HYG 小升 0.1%，顯示市場尚未轉成信用壓力，但也沒有給出長天期 IG 的價格修復。若新券 concession 因 Indonesia、Philippines FX debt 或 AI funding supply 擴大，應優先買高品質短中天期，而非拉長 duration 去追 yield。信用部位要看新券 concession 與二級市場 proxy 是否同步；只要 LQD 沒有修復、HYG 只是小幅反彈，投資組合應優先保留流動性。

TWD ETF row 只能做 attribution。USD/TWD 收 31.58，美元升值對 TWD NAV 是正向換算；但 30Y 5.03%、Brent 94.37、LQD 108.06 讓利率與 利差 價格回報 仍有拖累。台幣海外債 ETF 若要加碼，需要 FX translation、UST duration、信用代理 三者至少兩項同向；今天只有 FX 明確支撐。 這個訊號需要落到部位管理：先確認數字是否改變利率、匯率或利差通道，再決定是增加 Duration、保留 carry，還是降低 beta。

EM / Asia 配置要降低 policy beta。印尼新券若沒有政府保證、菲律賓企業有美元到期牆、韓國面臨 AI 景氣造成的升息壓力，三者都說明亞洲信用不能只看票息。短天期主權與準主權可以保留 carry；長天期、FX mismatch、能源進口和政策干預重疊的部位要等待更高 concession。 這個訊號需要落到部位管理：先確認數字是否改變利率、匯率或利差通道，再決定是增加 Duration、保留 carry，還是降低 beta。

股票反彈提高風險承接信心，但不改變 FI 加碼順序。SOX +5.6% 能降低 forced selling risk，卻沒有讓 10Y 回落或 DXY 跌破 100。配置上可以停止減碼 HY beta，但不應把半導體反彈轉譯成 duration 加碼；真正的確認仍是 CPI、Fed wording 與油價。 這個訊號需要落到部位管理：先確認數字是否改變利率、匯率或利差通道，再決定是增加 Duration、保留 carry，還是降低 beta。

流動性配置維持事件前 buffer。6 月 10 日 CPI、6 月 15-16 日 BOJ、6 月 16-17 日 FOMC、6 月 18 日 BI 都在同一窗口內，且每個事件都會影響不同 return channel。現金應保留到能應付 10Y 4.65%、Brent 98、USD/TWD 31.65 或 HYG 79 四個觸發點。 這個訊號需要落到部位管理：先確認數字是否改變利率、匯率或利差通道，再決定是增加 Duration、保留 carry，還是降低 beta。

sections.title: 五、後續觀察重點
sections.takeaway: 交易觸發集中在 CPI、Fed 語句、30Y 5% 區、油價 98 與亞洲 FX 防線。
paragraphs: 第一個 觀察點是 6 月 10 日 CPI。若 headline 接近或高於 4.2% y/y，且 core m/m 沒有降溫，2Y 會重新上測 4.20%、10Y 上看 4.65%；若 headline 低於 4.1% 且 core 放緩，5Y-10Y 才有確認加碼條件。這個門檻同時影響 Duration、Curve 和信用：低於 4.1% 才能讓 5Y-10Y 的 價格回報 有延續性，高於 4.2% 則會把收益率高點重新打開。

第二個 觀察點是 30Y 5.00%-5.08% 區間。30Y 已收 5.03%，若站上 5.08%，代表 期限溢價、供給與 全球利率 壓力還在擴大，長天期 IG 和高 Duration ETF 應降風險；若跌回 5.00% 下方，長端 才能從風險來源轉成收益來源。長端若失守，最先受影響的是高 Duration ETF、長天期 IG 和未避險美元債的利率回報；即使 USD/TWD 對 NAV 有正向換算，也可能被 UST 價格回報 抵銷。
第三個 觀察點是 Fed 6 月 16-17 聲明。若 Warsh 移除 降息傾向 並強調就業韌性與能源二階效應，前端 會繼續壓住風險資產；若他承認薪資降溫並淡化單次油價衝擊，2Y 4.15% 才有機會往 4.05% 回落。
第四個 觀察點是 Brent 98 美元。Brent 若上破 98，ECB 保險式升息、Fed 抗通膨可信度、航空與亞洲能源進口信用會同時升壓；若跌回 92，通膨風險溢價下降，AI rebound 才比較可能轉化成 broader risk-on。 這個訊號需要落到部位管理：先確認數字是否改變利率、匯率或利差通道，再決定是增加 Duration、保留 carry，還是降低 beta。
第五個 觀察點是亞洲 FX。USD/TWD 若升破 31.65，對 TWD NAV 換算仍是正向，但也可能反映美元利差與資金外流壓力，需要看 UST / 利差 是否抵銷；USD/IDR 若不能回到 18,000 下方，Indonesia beta 還不能恢復。 這個訊號需要落到部位管理：先確認數字是否改變利率、匯率或利差通道，再決定是增加 Duration、保留 carry，還是降低 beta。
第六個 觀察點是信用 proxy。LQD 跌破 108 代表長端利率開始傷害 IG ETF 價格回報；HYG 跌破 79 則代表 HY beta 失去 股市反彈 支撐。兩者如果同步走弱，台北盤應先降 beta，而不是靠 USD/TWD 支撐 NAV。 這個訊號需要落到部位管理：先確認數字是否改變利率、匯率或利差通道，再決定是增加 Duration、保留 carry，還是降低 beta。

第七個 觀察點是 AI funding supply。若 SpaceX、Moonshot、AI infrastructure loan / bond deals 能被市場吸收，SOX 12,900 上方可降低 forced selling；若新供給造成現金抽離，S&P 500 即使接近 7,400 也會面臨估值和 funding 雙重壓力。 這個訊號需要落到部位管理：先確認數字是否改變利率、匯率或利差通道，再決定是增加 Duration、保留 carry，還是降低 beta。

en.title: Daily FI Market Tape | 2026-06-08 close
summary: USTs paused at the front end but remained sticky at the long end: 2Y 4.15%, 10Y 4.56%, 30Y 5.03%, and 2s10s at 41bp.
AI dip-buying lifted SOX 5.6%, Nasdaq 100 1.6%, and S&P 500 0.3%, but Dow fell 0.2% and breadth was weaker than the headline.
The next macro gate is June 10 CPI, with headline expected near 4.2% y/y; year-end Fed hike risk is back in the price.
Taipei positioning must split FX translation from rates price return: USD/TWD 31.58 helps TWD NAV translation, while 30Y 5.03%, Brent 94.37, and LQD softness limit broad adds.

headline.primary: Front-end yields paused, but 30Y near 5% keeps rates risk alive before CPI
headline.secondary: 2Y 4.15%, 10Y 4.56%, 30Y 5.03%; SOX +5.6% improved risk tone, but duration adds still need softer CPI and lower oil.

regime_strip.label: Rates
regime_strip.value: Front-end pause with sticky long end

positioning.label: Duration
positioning.best_expression: Stage 5Y-10Y only; add only if CPI is below 4.1% and Brent falls below $92.
positioning.risk_trigger: Cut duration if 10Y breaks 4.65% or 30Y breaks 5.08%.

positioning.label: Curve
positioning.best_expression: Keep 30Y exposure small until 30Y moves back below 5.00%.
positioning.risk_trigger: A return of 2s10s below 35bp would signal renewed front-end pressure.

positioning.label: Credit / ETF
positioning.best_expression: Prefer short-to-intermediate IG and liquid ETFs; HY beta needs better equity breadth.
positioning.risk_trigger: Reduce credit beta if LQD breaks 108 or HYG breaks 79.

positioning.label: FX / NAV
positioning.best_expression: USD/TWD 31.58 supports TWD NAV translation, but rates and credit still decide total return.
positioning.risk_trigger: If USD/TWD is above 31.65 while LQD breaks 108, check rates and spread losses before adding.

positioning.label: Add condition
positioning.best_expression: Need at least two of CPI below 4.1%, Brent below $92, and 10Y below 4.50%.
positioning.risk_trigger: Cancel duration adds if CPI is above 4.2%, Brent is above $98, or SOX falls back to 12,000.

driver_decomposition.fi_impact: Front-end pause with long-end pressure keeps duration returns constrained.
CPI decides whether 10Y trades toward 4.65% or 4.50%.
Lowers forced-selling risk but does not remove UST or credit-spread risk.
Energy premium keeps Fed and ECB credibility pressure alive.

driver_decomposition.signal: USD/TWD closed at 31.58 and DXY at 100.04.
driver_decomposition.fi_impact: The strong dollar supports TWD NAV translation for unhedged USD bonds, while rates and credit price return can still offset the FX benefit.
The long end did not follow the front-end pause, showing that term premium and issuance absorption remain active; high-duration ETF price return needs a wider yield cushion.

key_levels.label: 30Y UST
key_levels.note: Key for long IG and high-duration ETFs.

key_levels.label: SOX
key_levels.note: If AI fails there, cut credit beta.

key_levels.label: USD/TWD
key_levels.note: Positive TWD NAV translation, but split UST and spread effects.

event_risks.label: U.S. CPI June 10
event_risks.note: Sticky core near 4.2% would keep 10Y in the 4.55%-4.65% pressure zone.

event_risks.label: FOMC June 16-17
event_risks.note: Removing easing-bias language would pressure 2Y; keeping it would help front-end relief.

event_risks.label: BOJ June 15-16
event_risks.note: Hike case exists, but demand still matters.

event_risks.label: ECB this week
event_risks.note: European tightening adds global duration pressure.

event_risks.label: BI June 18
event_risks.note: Weak measures keep Asia EM beta discounted.

asia_update.label: Taiwan FX
asia_update.note: TWD NAV translation is positive; rates and spreads may offset.

asia_update.label: Korea bonds
asia_update.note: AI growth can also raise local rates.

asia_update.label: Indonesia
asia_update.note: New-issue concession and policy credibility matter.

rows.label: S&P 500
rows.note: AI dip-buying supported the index, but breadth was weaker than the headline.

rows.label: Nasdaq Composite
rows.note: Growth shares recovered part of Friday losses, still conditional on CPI.

rows.label: Nasdaq 100
rows.note: High-beta tech rebounded without removing rates pressure.

rows.label: SOX
rows.note: The chip bounce repaired positioning stress, but it did not clear macro rates risk.

rows.label: Dow
rows.note: Traditional cyclicals lagged, keeping the rebound narrow.

rows.label: DXY
rows.note: Dollar near 100 keeps Asia FX under pressure.

rows.label: USD/TWD
rows.note: A weaker TWD supports FX translation for TWD NAV, while rates and spreads can offset it.

rows.label: Brent
rows.note: Oil retained inflation premium before CPI.

rows.label: Gold
rows.note: Gold held steady but was constrained by real rates.

rows.label: Credit Proxy
rows.note: IG duration lagged while HY beta stabilized; keep the read on carry and liquidity, not broad risk-on.

rows.label: U.S. CPI
rows.expected: headline about +4.2% y/y; core m/m expected to cool slightly
rows.note: A print near 4.2% with sticky core can push 10Y toward 4.65%.

rows.label: Fed pricing
rows.value: year-end 25bp hike back in price; second hike about 16%
rows.expected: June 16-17 meeting still likely on hold
rows.note: Front-end pricing moved from waiting for cuts to hike-tail risk.

rows.label: U.S. payrolls aftershock
rows.note: Jobs data still shapes the Fed path, while slower wages allowed some dip-buying.

rows.label: ECB
rows.value: possible insurance hike this week; euro-zone inflation 3.2%
rows.expected: market sees two 25bp hikes this year; some warn about 2011-style risk
rows.note: European tightening pressure raises the opportunity cost of global duration.

rows.label: Japan GDP / BOJ
rows.note: Growth is firm enough for BOJ risk, but capex softness tempers the pace.

rows.label: Korea rates
rows.value: local bonds -7.5% YTD; 3Y about 3.9%; core CPI 2.5%
rows.expected: swaps price at least three BOK hikes to 3.25%
rows.note: AI growth links equities, inflation, supply, and local duration pressure.

rows.label: Philippines FX debt
rows.value: large firms face about $26bn maturities; USD debt 37.6%
rows.expected: FX risk warning after peso record weakness
rows.note: Asia credit needs FX mismatch and refinancing-wall discounts.

rows.label: Indonesia funding
rows.value: Danantara dollar roadshow; sovereign dollar spread about 71bp
rows.expected: about +3bp YTD versus Asian IG -13bp to 50bp
rows.note: Weak policy credibility raises new-issue concessions.

sections.title: UST close and curve moves
sections.takeaway: Front-end relief is not enough while the 30Y sector stays near 5%.
paragraphs: The June 8 close was not a clean relief trade. 2Y finished at 4.15%, 10Y at 4.56%, and 30Y at 5.03%; the front end paused, but the long end stayed near the level that hurts high-duration ETF price return.

The weekly and monthly anchors still describe a high-rate regime: 2Y is up about 10bp on the week and 25bp on the month, while 5Y and 10Y remain above the levels needed for a clean duration reset. One quiet front-end session is not enough to declare a Fed pivot.

The curve message is long-end pressure, not a growth-scare rally. 2s10s widened to about 41bp and 5s30s to about 78bp because the front end stopped selling first, while 20Y and 30Y yields still sat around 5%.

Payrolls remain the key background for the rate level: May NFP at +172k versus roughly +80k to +85k expected kept the Fed tail alive even though the unemployment rate was 4.3% and wage momentum was not explosive.

Oil prevents a simple bullish duration read. Brent near $94 and WTI above $91 are not a fresh energy shock, but they keep the inflation premium high enough that CPI needs to do real work before 10Y can sustain a break lower.

The cash close and Asia session point to the same portfolio conclusion: demand can stabilize the belly, but the 30Y sector has not shown enough buying interest below 5% to support a broad 20Y+ ETF add.

The investment implication is to treat 10Y 4.55%-4.65% as a pressure zone. A move below 4.50% after softer CPI can justify a staged 5Y-10Y add; a move above 4.65% or a 30Y break above 5.08% should reduce duration risk.

sections.title: UST interpretation
sections.takeaway: CPI and FOMC wording decide whether the front-end pause becomes a belly add.
paragraphs: The front end could not rally with conviction because the market is still pricing policy optionality. The better question is not whether 2Y dipped by a few basis points, but whether CPI and the FOMC statement let the market remove the renewed hike tail.

The Fed reaction function should be read through language discipline. If the statement removes easing-bias language or stresses inflation persistence, 2Y can retest 4.20%; if it acknowledges wage cooling and treats oil as contained, front-end relief can extend.

The 10Y discussion around 4.65%-4.70% matters because it defines the stop zone for staged duration. A break below 4.45% would show real belly demand; staying between 4.55% and 4.65% keeps the trade tactical rather than strategic.

Japanese foreign-bond demand is a cushion, not a reversal signal. Weekly buying can soften selloffs, but it does not erase the supply, term-premium, and oil constraints keeping the 30Y sector near 5%.

Other central banks complicate the UST read because they raise the global cost of owning duration. ECB, BOJ, and Asia policy risk make long-end rallies harder to trust unless U.S. inflation data also turns lower.

Credit was calmer than equities but not cleanly bullish. LQD at 108.06 with a small loss means IG still carries duration drag, while HYG near 79.54 shows HY beta stabilized but has not become the main source of return.

For TWD-denominated overseas-bond ETFs, USD/TWD 31.58 supports FX translation, but the return still needs to be split into FX, UST price return, and credit spread return. FX alone should not be treated as an add signal.

sections.title: Other market moves
sections.takeaway: The equity rebound lowers stress but does not clear duration or credit risk.
paragraphs: The cross-asset close was a narrow rebound rather than broad risk clearance. SOX rose 5.6% and Nasdaq 100 rose 1.6%, but Dow fell 0.2%, Brent stayed near $94, and Asia FX pressure remained visible.

The chip bounce repaired part of Friday’s positioning damage, but it did not clear rates risk. For FI, the useful signal is that forced risk reduction eased; it is not evidence that CPI, the Fed, or long-end supply have turned benign.

Oil sits between relief and risk premium. Brent below $98 avoids an immediate stagflation alarm, but a sustained move above that level would raise the hurdle for both front-end relief and long-end ETF price repair.

Asia FX is a credit screen because weaker local currencies raise the cost of USD liabilities and hedges. Philippine external funding pressure and peso weakness are relevant for EM spread discipline, not for the core UST close.

Indonesia remains an EM credibility check. Danantara’s dollar roadshow and the absence of an explicit sovereign guarantee mean new-issue concession and policy credibility matter more than headline yield pickup.
Korea shows why an AI boom can still be difficult for bonds. Strong equity demand can coexist with higher inflation, more funding needs, and a local curve that prices additional BOK tightening.

Japan gives a mixed global-duration signal: GDP was firm enough to keep BOJ normalization alive, while capex softness slows the urgency. For U.S. duration, that means foreign demand can cushion volatility but should not be the only reason to add long-end exposure.

sections.title: Allocation implications
sections.takeaway: Stage 5Y-10Y duration only after CPI/oil confirmation; keep 20Y+ and HY beta restrained.
paragraphs: Duration should stay neutral to slightly constructive, concentrated in 5Y-10Y. The yield level is more attractive, but the add trigger still needs softer CPI, lower oil, or a 10Y move back below 4.50%.

Curve exposure should avoid chasing the front end. If CPI is soft, the belly offers a cleaner price-return setup; the 30Y sector should remain small until it trades back below 5.00% with confirmation from oil and supply conditions.

Credit and ETF exposure should favor quality and liquidity. IG income can be held, but LQD has not repaired enough to call it a total-return green light; HY beta should be reassessed only if HYG holds above 79 and SOX remains stable.
The Taiwan ETF line is attribution, not a standalone buy signal. A weaker TWD helps the TWD NAV translation, but higher UST yields and weaker credit prices can offset the FX benefit in total return.

EM and Asia exposure should reduce policy beta before major events. Indonesia funding, Philippine USD maturities, Korea rate pressure, and BOJ risk all argue for higher liquidity and less reliance on spread carry alone.

The equity rebound improves risk absorption but does not change the FI sequence. It can stop forced de-risking in credit beta, but duration adds still need CPI, FOMC language, oil, and 30Y confirmation.
Liquidity buffers should stay in place before CPI, BOJ, FOMC, and BI. Useful redeployment levels are 10Y below 4.50%, 30Y below 5.00%, Brent below $92, and LQD/HYG holding 108/79.

sections.title: Watchlist
sections.takeaway: CPI, 30Y, FOMC language, Brent, Asia FX, and LQD/HYG are the action map.
paragraphs: CPI on June 10 is the first decision point. A print near or above 4.2% with sticky core keeps 2Y near 4.20% and 10Y in the 4.55%-4.65% pressure zone; a print below 4.1% can move 5Y-10Y from watch to staged add.
The 30Y 5.00%-5.08% zone is the long-end test. Above 5.08%, reduce long-duration IG and 20Y+ ETF risk; below 5.00%, long-end exposure can become an income-plus-price-return candidate again.

The June 16-17 FOMC statement matters through wording. Removing easing-bias language or emphasizing inflation persistence pressures the front end; keeping two-sided language allows the 2Y sector to extend relief.

Brent at $98 and $92 sets the inflation-risk band. Above $98, duration and Asia credit need more protection; below $92, inflation premium and central-bank pressure ease enough to support staged belly exposure.

Asia FX should be monitored through attribution, not used as the only trade signal. USD/TWD above 31.65 can support TWD NAV translation, but it can also indicate outflow pressure that hurts spreads and risk appetite.

Credit proxy levels should decide beta risk. LQD below 108 signals IG duration drag; HYG below 79 signals weaker HY appetite. If both weaken, cut credit beta before relying on FX translation to support NAV.

AI funding supply remains a market-liquidity check. If large deals are absorbed and SOX holds above 12,900, forced selling risk falls; if supply drains cash and SOX returns toward 12,000, reduce beta and keep duration adds on hold.
